recommendations.title: AquaSlash
recommendations.overview: Thrills, Chills and Screwball-Comedy meet Tiny Bikinis and G o R y  dismemberment in this Chlorine & Blood drenched Murder-Mystery.

recommendations.title: Easy Virtue
recommendations.overview: A young Englishman marries a glamorous American. When he brings her home to meet the parents, she arrives like a blast from the future - blowing their entrenched British stuffiness out the window.

recommendations.title: If Beale Street Could Talk
recommendations.overview: After her fiance is falsely imprisoned, a pregnant African-American woman sets out to clear his name and prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: The Help
recommendations.overview: Aibileen Clark is a middle-aged African-American maid who has spent her life raising white children and has recently lost her only son; Minny Jackson is an African-American maid who has often offended her employers despite her family's struggles with

recommendations.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
recommendations.overview: A couple's attitudes are challenged when their daughter brings home a fiancé who is black.

recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: You've Got This
recommendations.overview: An ad creative and a successful exec have a great marriage — until he wants to be a dad just as her star is rising. Then he brings someone new home.

recommendations.title: Get Married If You Can
recommendations.overview: Ana Paula catches her fiancé cheating. After a night of drinking, she wakes up far from home, not so certain she wants to go back.

recommendations.title: 5 to 7
recommendations.overview: A young writer begins an affair with an older woman from France whose open marriage to a diplomat dictates that they can meet only between the hours of 5 p.m. to 7 p.m.
